features.featureTitle: Save the uploaded logo image as a static asset at `frontend/public/assets/generated/luid-logo.dim_256x256.png` and use it as the platform logo across all pages: replace any existing text-only or placeholder logo in the Header component (`frontend/src/components/Header.tsx`) with an `` tag referencing `/assets/generated/luid-logo.dim_256x256.png`, and also display it prominently on all three login pages (ClientLogin, MasterLogin, StaffLogin) above the login form heading.
